description:
Overview:

This CC cream is multi-tasking color correcting cream, which helps to enhance skins natural radiance with light but buildable coverage.
It is formulated with Centella Asiatica, an ingredient known for soothing the skin while helping to awaken the skin's natural radiance, protecting moisture in the skin and smoothly correcting the skin texture.
This unique light-textured formula contains pigments that change color upon application to adjust to your skin tone, presenting a natural and even complexion, soft and transparent, making the skin look flawless and "transparent"



How to use:
After basic skin care, apply a thin layer with fingers to the skin at the last step,
then watch the formula warm to your skin and adjust your skin tone.




Product Information:
Efficacy: improve skin color
Specification: bcc Centella asiatica CC Cream #1 (dark) bcc Centella asiatica CC Cream #2 (light color)
Applicable skin type: Mixed type
Cosmetics for special purposes: no
Category: Makeup Primer




Packing List:
Isolation cream * 1
